content.en:
After killing this black mist dragon, Ye Tian began to look for resources nearby.

Soon, he really found the good stuff.

"What is this?"

He saw a purple-red grass, containing very powerful energy, but this energy seemed to be sealed, so it looked a little ordinary.

He gathers this resource and continues to search.

Subsequently.

He found grass or flowers similar to this treasure resource, and collected them all.

Then, he left the place and sent the resources away.

......

Beyond this treasure land.

In a palace that had only been built recently, Ye Tian's true body was staying here, taking out these special resources in his hands.

At this time, the energy of these resources burst out, one by one containing terrifying energy, if he hadn't suppressed the energy, otherwise it would definitely permeate the surrounding territory, causing many bone transformation realm peeps.

"These resources should be newly born resources, not suitable for conventional resources, and there is no record of Guheng Mountain. As for the usefulness, you can only refine it yourself to try the effect. "

He didn't worry that these resources would hurt his body, and most of them just needed to be replaced with a duplicate body.

Immediately.

He swallowed a grass plant and began refining it.

Feel its effect while refining it, and deduce its usefulness at the same time.

In this way, the deduction is accurate, and there will be no mistakes.

Time passed slowly, and the effect of this grass gradually came out, and its specific effect was also deduced by him.

"It can temper the immeasurable will, and it can also slightly improve the understanding!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The point is that this is not a temporary ascension, but a permanent ascension.

In this way, the value of this resource is very high!

After that, he tried to refine other resources, and found that the effects were similar, all of which could temper immeasurable will and improve understanding.

The point is, it works on him.

He is a genius of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm, and being able to have an effect on him shows the preciousness of these resources!

"While the other powerhouses don't know the value of this treasure land, they have to get out the resources inside, otherwise once it is really exposed, not only those Venerable Lords of Guheng Mountain will come to snatch it, but even the Deputy Mountain Lords will be interested. "

"Once it spreads, it will also cause other forces to snatch it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he was ready to swallow it privately, and then take out some resources to Gu Hengshan afterwards, which was enough!

Anyway, if other bone transformation realms want to enter the treasure land here, it will be very dangerous, even if they are the other side level geniuses of the ninth bone transformation realm, there is no way to enter the inner enclosed area, otherwise it will be easy to fall.

Therefore, it is only suitable for him to go in.

But if there is a way to resist the rules here in the Origin Realm, he is not clear, after all, he is not in the Origin Realm.

His True Body Replica Body was refining these resources, while his Black Abyss Giant Ape Replica Body continued to explore the inner area of that treasure land.

The inner area of this treasure land is full of powerful creatures, similar to the Black Mist Dragon.

And Ye Tian relied on the advantages of the Black Abyss Giant Ape's replication body, and the strength he exerted was very strong, so he killed these creatures one by one, and then took the time to find those resources, and brought them all out.

Therefore, he does not lack these resources now, and he can refine them to his heart's content.

As time passed, Ye Tian's immeasurable will became stronger and stronger, and his comprehension became higher and higher.

The strength of immeasurable will still has a great impact on combat effectiveness.

For example, the magic of the other side also needs the blessing of immeasurable will, if the immeasurable will is very strong, the power of the magic power of the other side will naturally be even stronger.

But.

At his level, it is difficult for the immeasurable will to be improved, and the gap between them is not too big.

Therefore, a genius like him on the other side of the Bone Transformation Realm would not focus on improving the immeasurable will, because it was too much waste of time and energy, and the final effect was not good, and it was difficult to improve the immeasurable will.

But this time is different, these resources are used to improve the immeasurable will, the effect is very good, and it can also improve his understanding, he naturally wants to frantically refine these resources to improve his immeasurable will and understanding.

As the long years passed.

Ye Tian's immeasurable will increased by two, three, and five times......

Finally, on this day, his immeasurable will seemed to have reached a certain limit.

"Could it be that my immeasurable will is about to reach the level of the will of the Origin Realm?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The will can break through the shackles of the realm, for example, he has not yet broken through to the origin realm, but the will can break through to this realm, and there is a precedent for this in the land of eternity.

However, it is extremely difficult to do this.

It is rumored that when the Lord of Chaos was in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, his will was raised to the will of the Origin Realm.

But how to do it, other strong people are not clear.

But now, Ye Tian has some guesses.

"Maybe the Lord of Chaos also found a resource similar to this, and then relied on a massive amount of resources to raise his will to the level of the will of the Origin Realm!" Ye Tian guessed.

And once the will breaks through to the will of the Origin Realm, his strength will be greatly improved, whether it is physical strength or the magic power of the other side, or the golden body of the other side, he can exert a more powerful effect and power.

However, if you want to really break through to the will of the Origin Realm, it is naturally very difficult.

He refined these resources, but he has never been able to break through.

"It should be that the grade of these resources is not enough, and you need to find more top-level resources to help your will complete the breakthrough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he was ready to let the Black Abyss Giant Ape copy body continue to penetrate into the core area of that treasure land, where there would definitely be more precious special resources.

And then he did just that.

......

The core area of the treasure land.

Ye Tian came here, and as soon as he entered this area, a terrifying aura came.

No, it's the power of the will of terror!

In this place where the immeasurable will is sealed, the other party can burst out with such a terrifying will power, which is absolutely extremely rare, which shows how powerful its own will is, and it may even reach the level of the will of the Origin Realm.

Of course.

Even so, these creatures don't have supernatural powers, so he still has a chance of defeating them.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian broke into the territory of a black mist true wolf and fought with the other party.

The will of this black mist true wolf was terrifying, so the combat power that erupted was naturally extremely powerful.

Moreover, the other party's body is extremely tough and powerful.

Ye Tian relied on the magic skills of the other side to fight with the other party a lot, and only then did he kill the other party and occupy this territory.
